commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3f70e4a69c315892628c08b47a535888a5db6a0d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps `MatrixAuthedHttpClient.requestJson` JSON parsing in a Matrix-specific malformed-JSON error, adds a unit test, and adds a standalone loopback HTTP proof script.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +173. Total +180 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main routes Matrix SDK calls through `MatrixAuthedHttpClient.requestJson`, which directly calls `JSON.parse(text)` for successful `application/json` responses. I did not run a live homeserver repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-facing proof plus a boundary-compliant proof shape, so this should not be routed to ClawSweeper repair automation as a substitute for the contributor's real behavior evidence.

target.title: fix(matrix): guard JSON.parse against malformed homeserver response bodies
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.ts:55` calls `JSON.parse(text)` on the Matrix homeserver response body without try/catch. If the homeserver returns `Content-Type: application/json` with malformed body, the unhandled `SyntaxError` propagates to the caller.

## Changes

- `extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.ts`: wrap `JSON.parse(text)` in try/catch → `Error("Matrix homeserver returned malformed JSON")` with `statusCode` attached
- `extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.test.ts`: test verifying malformed JSON → Error
- `test/_proof_matrix_json_guard.mts`: **v2** — creates a real `node:http` server, creates `MatrixAuthedHttpClient` pointed at it, calls `requestJson` to exercise the actual changed code path

Label: bugfix | merge-risk: 🟢 minimal | AI-assisted

## Evidence

### Real HTTP proof — calls MatrixAuthedHttpClient.requestJson (L2)

```
$ node --import tsx test/_proof_matrix_json_guard.mts

[proof] malformed JSON server on :XXXXX
PASS  malformed JSON: throws Error :: type=Error
PASS  malformed JSON: mentions malformed JSON :: msg="Matrix homeserver returned malformed JSON"
PASS  malformed JSON: has statusCode :: statusCode=200
PASS  valid JSON: parsed correctly :: result={"user_id":"@test:matrix.org"}
PASS  non-JSON content type: returns text unchanged :: result="pong"

[proof] 5 PASS, 0 FAIL
```

### Unit test — via performMatrixRequest mock

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.test.ts

 ✓ MatrixAuthedHttpClient > throws descriptive error on malformed JSON success response
 ... (all existing tests pass)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
```

### v2 fix

v1 had only unit-test output. v2 adds proof script that creates a real HTTP server and calls `requestJson` — exercising the actual changed try/catch path (v3 pattern from #97889).
